ex-01.name: Finger Open and Close
steps: Prepare for Finger Open and Close.
Keep your hand clearly in the camera frame.

ex-02.name: Finger Stretch
steps: Keep your hand clearly in the camera frame.

ex-03.name: Finger Spreading
steps: Keep your hand clearly in the camera frame.

ex-04.name: Finger Tapping
steps: Keep your hand clearly in the camera frame.

ex-05.name: Thumb Touch Each Finger
steps: Prepare for Thumb Touch Each Finger.
Keep your hand clearly in the camera frame.

ex-06.name: Finger Lifts
steps: Keep your hand clearly in the camera frame.

ex-07.name: Finger Walking
steps: Keep your hand clearly in the camera frame.

ex-08.name: Finger Pinch
steps: Keep your hand clearly in the camera frame.

ex-09.name: Finger Squeezing
steps: Keep your hand clearly in the camera frame.

ex-10.name: Finger Curl
steps: Keep your hand clearly in the camera frame.

ex-11.name: Thumb Flexion
steps: Keep your hand clearly in the camera frame.

ex-12.name: Thumb Extension
steps: Keep your hand clearly in the camera frame.

ex-13.name: Wrist Rotations
steps: Keep your hand clearly in the camera frame.

ex-15.name: Lunges
steps: Lower hips until both knees are bent at 90 degrees.

ex-18.name: Plank
steps: Keep body in a straight line.

ex-19.name: Side Plank
steps: Lift hips to form a straight line.

ex-20.name: Wall Sit
steps: Slide down until knees are at 90 degrees.

ex-21.name: Push-ups
steps: Start in plank position on hands.
Lower body until chest is near floor.

ex-23.name: Deadbug
steps: Lie on back, arms up, knees at 90 degrees.
Lower opposite arm and leg to floor.

ex-24.name: Clamshells
steps: Keep feet together and lift top knee.

ex-25.name: Step-ups
steps: Stand in front of a step.

ex-26.name: Russian Twists
steps: Sit with knees bent, lean back slightly.

ex-27.name: Superman
steps: Lift arms and legs off the floor simultaneously.

ex-28.name: Hip Thrusts
steps: Rest upper back on a bench.

ex-29.name: Heel Drops
steps: Stand on edge of a step.
Drop heels below the step level slowly.

ex-30.name: Toe Taps
steps: Lie on back, legs in tabletop position.

ex-32.name: Lateral Raises
steps: Lift arms out to the sides to shoulder height.

ex-33.name: Bicep Curls
steps: Bend elbows to lift weights to shoulders.

ex-34.name: Tricep Extensions
steps: Bend elbows to lower weight behind head.

ex-35.name: Hamstring Curls
steps: Bend knee to bring heel toward glutes.

ex-38.name: Farmer's Walk
steps: Hold heavy weights in each hand.

ex-39.name: Hamstring Stretch
steps: Sit on floor, one leg straight.

ex-40.name: Quad Stretch
steps: Grab ankle and pull heel to glute.

ex-41.name: Calf Stretch
steps: Step one foot back, keep heel down.

ex-43.name: Triceps Stretch
steps: Reach one arm overhead and bend elbow.
Gently pull elbow with other hand.

ex-44.name: Shoulder Cross-arm
steps: Use other arm to pull it closer.

ex-46.name: Neck Rotation
steps: Turn head to look over shoulder.

ex-49.name: Cobra Stretch
steps: Push up on hands, keeping hips on floor.

ex-50.name: Seated Twist
steps: Cross one leg over the other.

ex-52.name: Figure 4 Stretch
steps: Cross one ankle over opposite knee.

ex-53.name: Knee to Chest
steps: Pull one knee into chest with hands.

ex-55.name: IT Band Stretch
steps: Stand, cross one leg behind the other.
Lean away from the back leg.

ex-56.name: Wrist Flexor Stretch
steps: Gently pull fingers down with other hand.

ex-57.name: Wrist Extensor Stretch
steps: Gently pull fingers down with other hand.

ex-58.name: Ankle Circles
steps: Rotate ankle in circles clockwise and counterclockwise.

ex-59.name: Torso Twist
steps: Twist torso side to side, letting arms swing naturally.

ex-60.name: Latissimus Stretch
steps: Grab one wrist and lean to the opposite side.

ex-61.name: Thread the Needle
steps: Slide one arm under the other.

ex-62.name: Downward Dog
steps: Try to press heels to the floor.

ex-63.name: Pectoral Corner Stretch
steps: Lean chest forward into the corner.
